horoscope: It's a time in the lunar month to explore your inner world, dear Aries. Quiet activities and pleasurable pastimes are most appealing, and taking things easy is fortifying. Even so, you can be productive today, even if it all happens in your mind! Sorting things out can be in strong focus. A mature connection with a friend or a more reasonable approach to your happiness goals and social life can be a theme this week. Implementing small, manageable changes can be rewarding. This is a good time for checking in with your inner world while picking signals from your environment that you might otherwise whiz past if you’re going too quickly. There may be some focus on sharing resources or borrowing money.

The Moon spends the day in your social sector, dear Taurus, and harmonizes with pleasant Venus and lucky Jupiter, bringing a happy, pleasant theme to your life. You might thoroughly enjoy and benefit from connecting and learning today. At the same time, you have a good sense of timing with practical matters now. You might thoroughly enjoy cooking up a game plan for achieving your goals. Clarity feels good, and transits are potent for physical therapy or earthy and grounding activities. A dream can inspire you to reach your goals, particularly related to relationships.

The Moon's all-day transit of your solar tenth house calls your attention to practical goals and priorities, dear Gemini. It's a good time to get back on track if you've veered a little off course. Building and collecting appeal to you more than usual. Cooperation comes more easily today. More commitment and discipline in your social life can also be rewarding right now. You can reach a new level of understanding or awareness in a connection. There is more patience in your approach to the world than usual today, and if channeled well, you can get a lot done. You can be particularly attracted to hands-on or involving activities.

Today's Moon draws out your desire to feed your spirit, dear Cancer, and sharing and cooperating come naturally. As well, you can enjoy more insight into a career matter, or forward movement on a significant project can be in the spotlight. The need for meaningful work is strong, and connecting with your true desires and needs can help you round out and define your goals. On a social level, people are rather straightforward. You could find it easier to bring up tricky topics and get something out into the open.

There can be a warm, intimate connection with someone or a special enjoyment of alone time today, dear Leo. You find it easy to pour your energy into a particular pursuit. Sensitivity and genuineness endear you to others. It can also be an excellent time for small, positive changes that feel good, largely because they seem likely to last. You're not interested in bandaid fixes. Instead, you'd rather make a bit of progress that has longevity. This also helps you manage stress. On another level, you may get the opportunity to work on letting go of resentment, or you might gain an understanding of a situation through someone's viewpoint.

Relationships and your social needs are in strong focus today, dear Virgo. It's a good time in the lunar month to give close relationships special attention. It can be rewarding and rather straightforward to come to a nice me-you balance with someone. A theme of cooperation, friendliness, and openness is with you now. It's also a strong time for feeling and being productive, even if you devote a small part of your day to a task that gets you ahead. You have a more mature sense of what's important, and fixing a problem with a solution that you expect to last is much more satisfying than quick fixes.  It’s also an excellent time to nurture or grow a business or work project. Prioritizing comes readily to you under current influences.

Your mindset is purposeful today, dear Libra, and you can enjoy taking care of things. It's a fine day for easy productivity. Even with a practical focus, you stand to enjoy growth and a sense of maturity in your relationships. As you pace yourself and consider all the angles, you feel more confident. Today is a good reminder that solving problems can take time, and it makes sense to get things right in certain areas rather than rushing. Harmonizing with a partner or close friend about core values can be satisfying. A learning experience can be in the spotlight, and perhaps also a breakthrough in thinking.

Today's Moon and its connections encourage paying special attention to self-expression, creativity, fun, pleasure, and leisure or entertainment, dear Scorpio. You're more emotionally invested in your heartfelt pursuits today, and your social confidence runs high. So does your general outlook! You want to feel inspired, and once inspired, you are more than willing to put forth the effort. You might also make meaningful connections through your work or the pursuit of wellness. You’re spirited yet grounded, and pacing yourself comes naturally. Your faith in a project or line of work can take you places and can feel good.

Transits find you seeking comfort and familiarity again today, dear Sagittarius, and you're in particularly good shape for bringing more balance to your domestic world. Pleasurable, restful, and simple activities are a strong draw. You're seeking more meaningful activities, especially your projects and hobbies. While you're aiming to center yourself today, you're also ready to apply yourself to a special pursuit. You're not rushing things, and it helps you feel a little more grounded. It’s also a fine time for growing a bond, particularly as you share ideas or past experiences.

Today's Moon and its connections boost your communications, dear Capricorn. While you might struggle with concentration early today, as the day advances, you attract helpful or pleasant connections and the information you need. Today's good for satisfying conversations and interesting ideas. You can feel quite valued, or you have a sense that you can manage stress and solve problems, one step at a time. Getting organized in your domestic world and/or with work and routines can be highly rewarding now. The key may be that you're not expecting too much or too little from yourself. Your feeling for which pursuits are most worthwhile is particularly sharp.

Today's Moon tugs at your practical side, dear Aquarius, and there can be a stronger focus on money, belongings, and business matters. Instead, this transit can be about craving comfort and security. A smooth, easygoing approach to others and your work or chores yields the best results right now. You recognize the power of your communications today, and how they help bond you to others and shape your future. Facing your responsibilities is rewarding at the moment, and the need to be productive is in the spotlight. Today can be very fertile for creative ideas and for zeroing in on projects that truly matter to you.

The Moon spends the day in your sign, dear Pisces, animating your emotions. You crave more interactivity with this transit! Good energy is with you to connect with others and cooperate. Personal urges tend to override most other concerns. Others see you in a particularly attractive light, and your need to be understood and acknowledged comes to the fore. As well, powerful energy is with you for getting to the bottom of problems. With an honest look at a plan, project, or area of your life, you get yourself in an empowered position. Your money sense is on point today. It’s also a potentially excellent time for breakthroughs related to home or family.
